ddls:
CREATE TABLE "annual_premiums" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the premium data */,
  "avg_premium_wisconsin" REAL /* Average annual premium for Wisconsin */,
  "yearly_change_wisconsin" REAL /* Yearly change in average premium for Wisconsin */,
  "avg_premium_us" REAL /* Average annual premium for the US */,
  "yearly_change_us" REAL /* Yearly change in average premium for the US */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance product */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "total_premiums_collected" REAL /* Total premiums collected in that year */,
  "number_of_policies" INTEGER /* Number of policies issued in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_premiums_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_premiums_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES insurance_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Health, Auto, Home) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product features */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum amount the insurance will cover */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Amount the policyholder must pay before the insurance covers the rest */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about what is covered and what is not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., Wisconsin, National) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market characteristics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the market */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the market */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation affecting the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the trend */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market associated with the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "avg_premium" REAL /* Average premium for the product in that year */,
  "yearly_change" REAL /* Yearly change in premium */,
  "total_premiums_collected" REAL /* Total premiums collected for the product in that year */,
  "number_of_policies" INTEGER /* Number of policies issued for the product in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES insurance_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation came into effect */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation will no longer apply */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the regulation on the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level within their role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data used for training */,
  "training_data_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data used for training */,
  "training_data_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "avg_premium" REAL /* Average premium across the market */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change compared to previous year */,
  "total_premiums_collected" REAL /* Total premiums collected in the market for that year */,
  "number_of_policies" INTEGER /* Number of policies issued in the market for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
